title: Fact Sheets and Other Resources - Canada.ca
content:
## Fact Sheets and Other Resources
Some of the documents listed below are available upon request only. You will be prompted for your contact information and the requested document will be emailed to you. Please allow at least 48 hours for a response.
- Advisory/scientific/expert committee/panel reports
- Research Permit Inspection Program / Posting Areas
